summary: Iteration 4 — verified the user-reported HTTP 404 bug on 'Send 200 Real Visits with Auto-Fill' is resolved. The root cause was missing runtime deps (openpyxl / xlrd) and missing Playwright chromium browser, which made load_rows_from_excel() fail the moment an xlsx was attached to POST /api/real-user-traffic/jobs. Main agent reinstalled openpyxl 3.1.5, et_xmlfile 2.0.0, xlrd 2.0.2, and `playwright install chromium --with-deps` — no code changes were needed. Regression run: test_iteration2_smoke.py = 37 passed, 1 skipped (intentional, /api/email-checker not implemented). Focused RUT test (new file test_rut_iteration4.py) = 15 passed, 0 failed, covering POST with real xlsx upload + automation_json, GET list, GET detail, POST /stop, DELETE, form-filler sanity, and a 400-validation edge case. Postback/pixel cross-DB fix from iteration 3 still passes.

minor.issue: The RUT background task uses Playwright+fake proxy 1.2.3.4:8080 and will fail at runtime (expected), BUT when the uvicorn --reload worker is shutting down while a RUT task is in-flight, uvicorn waits forever on 'Waiting for background tasks to complete.' and blocks all new requests until supervisorctl restart. Consider adding a hard-timeout / cancellation on job-runner tasks during shutdown, or use FastAPI lifespan to signal cancel to _RUT_JOBS.

requirements.txt lists openpyxl and xlrd but the deployed image shipped without them — meaning an xlsx upload to RUT silently 400'd with 'File parse failed: Missing optional dependency openpyxl'. Pin these in the base image or add a startup assertion (import openpyxl, pandas) that fails fast rather than at request time.

Playwright python package was installed but no browser binary was present (~/.cache/ms-playwright missing). Browsers eventually landed at /pw-browsers/chromium-1208 — make the install step explicit (`playwright install chromium --with-deps`) part of the image build, not a post-deploy fix.
find_click_across_dbs() iterates client.list_database_names() on every postback/pixel (O(N_users)). Add a clickid->user_id index in main_db.

action_items: Bake openpyxl, et_xmlfile, xlrd, and `playwright install chromium --with-deps` into the backend base image so the RUT form-fill path never regresses again.

Add a fast-fail health probe on startup: `import openpyxl, pandas, playwright` and verify the chromium binary exists; expose status via /health so monitoring can alert before a user clicks 'Send Visits'.
Make the RUT background-runner cancel-on-shutdown (FastAPI lifespan or per-job asyncio Task + CancelScope) — otherwise uvicorn --reload hangs when a job is in-flight and blocks all new HTTP requests.
(Carry-over from iteration 3) Introduce a clickid -> user_id index in main_db so postback/pixel stop scanning every user DB.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is ~9519 lines — split into routers (auth, admin, links, clicks, conversions, proxies, sub_users, real_user_traffic, form_filler, utilities). The RUT section alone is ~300 lines embedded in the monolith.

POST /api/real-user-traffic/jobs accepts automation_json as a stringified JSON form field and re-parses inside the handler. Consider a dedicated Pydantic Form model or a documented schema in the response to make the contract explicit for the UI.
Runtime dep drift (openpyxl/xlrd/playwright-chromium) surfaced only at user-click time — add a startup smoke assertion or CI check that imports every optional dep declared in requirements.txt.
Background RUT task has no cancellation on uvicorn shutdown — caused live-reload to hang the whole worker during this test run until supervisorctl restart backend.

/api/real-user-traffic/jobs/{job_id}/stop returns 404 with 'Job not running in this worker' when the job already finished in another worker — confusing semantics. Prefer returning 200 {stopped: false, status: 'completed'} in that case (the DB already has the terminal state).

success_rate.backend: 100% — smoke 37 pass / 1 skip / 0 fail; RUT 15 pass / 0 fail

test_credentials: Admin: admin@trackmaster.local / admin123 (from /app/memory/test_credentials.md). Fresh test_rut_<uuid>@example.com created per run with real_user_traffic=true, form_filler=true, email_checker=true, ua_generator=true, vpn_ips=true, proxy_ips=true + max_* quotas, cleaned via admin DELETE at the end.
seed_data_creation: Per-run (test_rut_iteration4.py): 1 pending user -> activated with full feature set; 1 link (offer_url=https://example.com/rut-test); 1 in-memory xlsx built via openpyxl with first_name/last_name/email/phone columns and 2 rows; 1 RUT job (proxies=1, user_agents=1, total_clicks=5, concurrency=1, form_fill_enabled=true, data_source=excel, skip_captcha=true, post_submit_wait=6, automation_json=[{action:scroll,y:800}], self_heal=true); job stopped and deleted in-test. All artefacts cleaned up by TestCleanup.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 4: user-reported 404 on RUT 'Send 200 Real Visits with Auto-Fill' is RESOLVED (root cause: missing openpyxl/xlrd + missing playwright-chromium binary at runtime; fixed by main agent via pip + `playwright install chromium --with-deps`). The RUT HTTP contract (POST create with xlsx, GET list, GET detail, POST stop, DELETE, 400-validation) is now covered by /app/backend/tests/test_rut_iteration4.py. Smoke /app/backend/tests/test_iteration2_smoke.py still 37/1skip/0fail, including the postback/pixel cross-DB assertions from iteration 3. Known open items are all non-blocking and listed in action_items. IMPORTANT for the next agent: editing files under /app/backend/ while tests run triggers uvicorn --reload; combined with a live RUT background task, the worker can hang on 'Waiting for background tasks to complete' — workaround is `sudo supervisorctl restart backend`.
rca_of_the_issue: User clicked 'Send 200 Real Visits with Auto-Fill' on the Real User Traffic page. Request: POST /api/real-user-traffic/jobs multipart, form_fill_enabled=true, data_source=excel, file=<xlsx>. Handler at server.py:3202 called load_rows_from_excel(content, filename) which uses pandas.read_excel(..., engine='openpyxl'). openpyxl was listed in requirements.txt but not installed in the running container (likewise xlrd for legacy .xls). pandas raised `ImportError: Missing optional dependency 'openpyxl'`, caught by the try/except, and re-raised as HTTPException(status_code=400, detail='File parse failed: ...'). UI showed it as 'HTTP 404' toast (frontend mis-labelled the status), masking the true 400. Independently, even after openpyxl was fixed, Playwright chromium was missing so the background runner would have exited on `_impl._errors.Error: Executable doesn't exist at .../chromium-*/chrome-linux/chrome`. Main agent fix: `pip install openpyxl==3.1.5 et_xmlfile==2.0.0 xlrd==2.0.2` and `playwright install chromium --with-deps` → chromium now at /pw-browsers/chromium-1208/chrome-linux/chrome. Verification: POST with a live xlsx now returns 200 {job_id, total: 5, form_fill_enabled: true, custom_automation: true, proxies: 1, user_agents: 1, ...}; job is persisted in db.real_user_traffic_jobs, listable, retrievable, stoppable, and deletable. 15/15 RUT assertions green.
